title: Dekton 2-Pack Ball End Hex & Torx Key Set | Ball Point Heads for Up to 25° Angles | Heat Treated for Strength | Handy Key Holder Included | Home Repairs & DIY | Includes Sizes 1.5mm - 10mm & T10 - T50
features: Ball End Design for Versatile Use: The unique ball point heads on these hex keys allow for operation at angles up to 25 degrees, providing exceptional maneuverability and ease of use in hard-to-reach areas. Ideal for a range of tasks, this design helps to make challenging jobs more manageable.

Dekton Torx Hex Key Set: This set includes nine essential Torx keys, ranging from T10 to T50, designed to handle various precision fastening tasks. Each key is heat-treated to enhance strength and durability, ensuring reliable performance even under tough conditions.

Versatile & Durable: Whether you're working on mechanical repairs or assembling furniture, this set provides the precision and strength needed for a wide range of applications. The heat-treated steel construction ensures that the keys withstand heavy use without bending or breaking, offering long-lasting durability.

Handy Key Holder Included: The set comes with a convenient key holder that keeps all nine keys organized and within easy reach. This practical feature helps prevent loss and ensures that you always have the right size tool at hand.

Ideal for DIY & Home Repairs: Perfect for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts, the Dekton Torx Hex Key Set is an excellent addition to any toolbox. It is designed to meet the demands of various fastening tasks, making it a versatile and reliable choice for your home repair and DIY needs.
description: The Dekton 2-Pack Ball End Hex & Torx Key Set is expertly designed for precision fastening and durability. Heat-treated for extra strength, these tools are perfect for tackling various home repairs and DIY projects. The set includes sizes ranging from T10 to T50 & 1.5mm to 10mm, catering to a wide array of fastening needs. Each key is crafted to fit securely in fasteners, reducing the risk of slipping or stripping. The ergonomic design ensures a comfortable grip, even during extended use, and the included handy key holder keeps everything organized and easily accessible. Ideal for both professional tradespeople and DIY enthusiasts, this set provides reliable performance and convenience for any task.
